mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tbl_password_reset (member_id, token, expires_at) VALUES (#{memberId}, #{token}, #{expiresAt})
mapper.select: SELECT member_id FROM tbl_password_reset WHERE token = #{token} AND used = 0 AND expires_at > NOW()
mapper.update: UPDATE tbl_password_reset SET used = 1 WHERE token = #{token}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM tbl_password_reset WHERE expires_at < NOW() OR used = 1
